text.title: Docker Security Hardening Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.fix: Set USER to non-root in Dockerfile + runtime.

antipattern.symptom: Vulnerable image deployed because CI only warned.
antipattern.fix: Fail on HIGH+; allow waiver workflow.

antipattern.symptom: Tampered image deployed; supply chain compromise.
